notes: EigenLayer accepts native ETH + LST deposits (stETH, rETH) and exposes them to AVS slashing. LRT protocols (ether.fi weETH, Renzo ezETH, Kelp rsETH, Puffer pufETH) wrap EigenLayer points + restaking rewards; LRT tokens are then composed into Pendle PT/YT and lending markets. Risk cascades: AVS slashing → LRT → Pendle/Aave/Morpho holders.
